claims.text: How would you lead AI-assisted engineering adoption across a delivery team while keeping code-quality gates intact?
Standardized Claude Code, GitHub Copilot, and Cursor across the 20-person delivery team in 2025–2026, accelerating recurring Drupal and React delivery.
Reduced environment-related regression incidents by ~30% through CI/CD tooling and Capistrano automation, achieving zero-downtime releases across multi-site environments.
Raised core-module unit test coverage to 80%+ by introducing PHPUnit and PHP Code Sniffer enforcement across delivery squads.
What does your current AI-assisted engineering workflow look like across code generation, review, and test scaffolding?
